title: The diner re-cooks: ecology works travel as provenance-locked Quick Snacks
editorial_proposition: A standing reuse relation transcribed retroactively (2026-07-17): six works of the ecology — one Ensemble premiere, five Meridian instruments — are re-served on data-snack.com as Quick Snacks whose per-file provenance frontmatter (supplier, work, gauntlet, inspected) is a delivery slip that predates this ledger; the transport automation exists but is deliberately only part-armed; one open correction is recorded (wing language in the supplier template). The relation is open and running.

proposition_author.note: retroactive transcription commissioned by Frank (2026-07-17); lean record — the nightly scribe appends from here

status.statusLine: open/standing — 7 works re-cooked, cook automation now armed and firing unattended (no PR), wing-language correction open

participants.local_status: native-speaker premiered S10 and re-cooked same day
five gauntlet-shipped works re-cooked under standing conditions; Split Seal refresh carries current caveat

non_participants.note: No Ulysses work appears in the quick corpus at the pinned commit. Documented non-relation, not failure.
